non_blocking_risks.risk: If the advanced artifact set changes after export generation, sequence and bundle exports must be regenerated.

profile_adherence.evidence: The run stayed autonomous and deep, which matched the need to carry advanced modeling through to downstream representation without repeated confirmation pauses.

advanced_mode_findings.item: The semantic source of truth remains in advanced-mode artifacts rather than the export layer.
When ordered resource scanning is explicit, resource-priority-policy.json should carry scan and ranking logic separately from resource-graph.json.

same_source_consistency.evidence: The graph, flow, contradiction, solution, and exported representation all refer to the same bounded system object.

cross_format_consistency.evidence: The Mermaid and representation bundle exports serialize the same advanced outputs that the JSON artifacts already define.

fact_validation_chain.item: Confirm system graph and flow artifacts exist before contradiction and solution outputs are reviewed.
Confirm resource-graph.json stays structural and does not absorb the full scan-order or resource-priority policy.
Confirm sequence export uses actor-network participants rather than inventing its own actors.
Confirm representation bundle targets finalized advanced artifacts rather than intermediate drafts.

unverifiable_assumptions.item: The downstream consumer of the representation bundle requires exactly the current set of selected exports and not a different serialization profile.

check.note: Core advanced artifact chain is present through solution-set.json.
sequence-diagram.mmd and representation-bundle.json exist and remain downstream-only.

scope_alignment_checks.item: No derived runtime operations artifact was required; the export layer remained attached to source-aligned advanced artifacts only.

check.note: resource-graph.json and actor-network.json were established before later exports.
sequence-diagram.mmd was generated only after stable advanced interaction artifacts existed.
representation-bundle.json points to finalized advanced outputs.

dispatch_recommendations.item: Proceed because advanced modeling remains the semantic source and representation stays downstream-only.

check.why: Once the advanced modeling chain has stabilized through solution-set.json, representation can proceed without reopening upstream semantics.
check.evidence: representation-bundle.json and sequence-diagram.mmd both consume advanced outputs downstream.

check.why: Without it, the sequence export lacks a stable participant and interaction basis.
check.evidence: mode-resolution.json explicitly hands off actor-network.json to representation mode.

profile_adjustment_recommendation.adjustment_reason: The current profile matched the round because deep autonomous expansion was needed, but no profile change signal appeared.

evaluation_report.score_reason: The example clearly shows advanced-to-representation handoff, but still covers only one export-heavy interaction pattern.
